description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a test stage containing two jobs. The manpage job uses the asciidoctor/docker-asciidoctor:latest image and runs make doc DIST_VERSION=HEAD. The shellcheck job uses the koalaman/shellcheck-alpine:latest image and runs shellcheck --shell sh completion.sh, shellcheck git-mr-to, and shellcheck --shell bash t/helper.bash. Both jobs run in the test stage and have no caches, artifacts, or special triggers.
